Vector.Ai Company Profile & Contact Info:
- Name: Vector.Ai
- Founder & CEO: Satyam Samrat Singh
- Email: vector.ai09@gmail.com
- Phone Numbers: +91 9217571488, +91 9122135215
- Address: Gaur Yamuna City, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh
- Vibe/Brand: Premium, professional, data-driven, client-focused, "Built on Values".
- Mission: To stop businesses from wasting money on vanity metrics and start focusing on what matters—Revenue.

Vector.Ai Team Member details:
- Name: Shivam K@ushik
- Role: FULL STACK DEVELOPER
- Description: Full-stack wizard responsible for the robust and scalable architecture behind our client solutions.

Vector.Ai Team Member details:

- Role: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER
- Description: Specialist in MERN stack and cloud architecture. Builds scalable backend systems for high-traffic applications.

Vector.Ai Team Member details:
- Name: Shanz Alam
- Role: BACKEND LEAD
- Description: Expert in database optimization and API security. Ensures 99.9% uptime for all client applications.

Vector.Ai Team Member details:

- Role: CREATIVE DIRECTOR
- Description: Award-winning designer with an eye for aesthetics. She ensures every pixel serves the brand narrative.

Vector.Ai Team Member details:
- Name: Shalu K@ushik
- Role: AI AUTOMATION LEAD
- Description: Expert strategist specializing in custom AI chatbot integration, CRM automation, and high-converting social media marketing automation.

Vector.Ai Team Member details:
- Name: Vikram Malhotra
- Role: SEO LEAD
- Description: Master of algorithms. Helping clients rank #1 on Google through white-hat technical and content SEO.

Vector.Ai Team Member details:
- Name: Neha Kapoor
- Role: CLIENT SUCCESS MANAGER
- Description: Dedicated to client happiness. She ensures smooth communication and timely delivery of all projects.

Vector.Ai Pricing Package details:
- Plan Name: Startup Plan
- Price: ₹19,999/month (Original: ₹35,000, Discount: 45% OFF)
- Description: Ideal for beginners
- Features: Social Media Management (2 Platforms) (Included), Basic SEO Setup (Included), 5 Graphic Designs/mo (Included), Monthly Performance Report (Included), Email Support (Included), Ads Management (Not Included), AI Automation (Not Included), 24/7 Support (Not Included)

Vector.Ai Pricing Package details:
- Plan Name: Growth Plan
- Price: ₹39,999/month (Original: ₹75,000, Discount: 50% OFF)
- Description: Everything you need to scale
- Features: Social Media Management (4 Platforms) (Included), Advanced SEO & Backlinking (Included), Google & Meta Ads Management (Included), 10 Graphic Designs + 2 Reels/mo (Included), Bi-Weekly Strategy Calls (Included), AI Automation (Not Included), 24/7 Priority Support (Not Included)

Vector.Ai Pricing Package details:
- Plan Name: Business Plan
- Price: ₹69,999/month (Original: ₹1,25,000, Discount: 45% OFF)
- Description: For aggressive market dominance
- Features: Omnichannel Social Media Marketing (Included), Full AI & Workflow Automation Suite (Included), Unlimited Graphic Design & Custom Copy (Included), 4 Professional Video Reels/mo (Included), Custom CRM Setup & Lead Scoring (Included), Dedicated Client Success Manager (Included), 24/7 Priority Support (Included)

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Digital Marketing Services
- Category: Marketing
- Description: Comprehensive performance marketing strategies to dominate your market. We craft data-driven campaigns that maximize ROI and drive explosive growth.
- Key Offerings: Google Ads (Search, Display, Video), Facebook & Instagram Ads
- Detailed Features:
Search Engine Marketing: Professional execution of Google Ads tailored to your specific market requirements and goals.
Social Media Ads: High-converting ad campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn to capture your target audience.
Retargeting Campaigns: Bring back bounced traffic with precision-targeted ads that follow users across the web.
Conversion Tracking: Advanced analytics setup to track every dollar spent and measure exact ROI.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Proven Track Record: We have generated over $50M in revenue for our clients across various industries.
Expert Execution: Our certified media buyers manage your ad spend as if it were their own.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Startup Mentorship
- Category: Consulting
- Description: Expert guidance for early-stage ventures to navigate growth challenges and scaling efficiently in competitive markets.
- Key Offerings: Business Model Planning, Pitch Deck Review
- Detailed Features:
Go-to-Market Strategy: Crafting a precise launch plan to acquire your first 1000 customers with minimal burn.
Fundraising Prep: Refining pitch decks, financial models, and narrative to secure seed and Series A funding.
Product-Market Fit: Validating ideas through rapid prototyping and deep customer interviews.
Operational Scaling: Building the right team and processes to handle hyper-growth without breaking.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Experienced Founders: Get mentored by leaders who have successfully built and exited multiple startups.
Venture Network: Direct introductions to top-tier angel investors and venture capital firms.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: IT Strategy Consulting
- Category: Consulting
- Description: Align your technology infrastructure and roadmap with your long-term business objectives to drive efficiency and innovation.
- Key Offerings: Tech Stack Audit, Digital Roadmap Planning
- Detailed Features:
Infrastructure Assessment: Comprehensive audit of your current servers, software, and security protocols.
Cloud Migration Strategy: Seamlessly transitioning legacy systems to modern, scalable cloud environments like AWS/Azure.
Cost Optimization: Identifying redundancies and cutting software bloat to save thousands in recurring fees.
Vendor Management: Negotiating and selecting the best third-party tech vendors for your specific needs.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Enterprise Experience: We have architected IT strategies for Fortune 500 companies and fast-growing unicorns.
Vendor Neutrality: Unbiased recommendations focused solely on what is best for your business.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Digital Transformation
- Category: Consulting
- Description: Modernize legacy systems and processes to thrive in the digital age, creating seamless experiences for your employees and customers.
- Key Offerings: Process Automation, Cloud Migration
- Detailed Features:
Workflow Digitization: Replacing paper-based and manual processes with automated digital workflows.
Legacy System Upgrade: Safely replacing outdated monolithic software with agile, microservices-based architectures.
Change Management: Training and supporting your team to ensure smooth adoption of new technologies.
Data Centralization: Breaking down data silos to create a single source of truth for your entire organization.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Seamless Transitions: Executing complex overhauls with zero disruption to your day-to-day operations.
Holistic Approach: We transform your tech, your processes, and your team culture simultaneously.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Market Research
- Category: Consulting
- Description: Data-driven insights to validate ideas, understand your competition deeply, and uncover hidden opportunities in your industry.
- Key Offerings: Competitor Analysis, Customer Surveys
- Detailed Features:
Deep Competitor Analysis: Reverse-engineering your rivals' strategies, traffic sources, and pricing models.
User Persona Development: Creating hyper-detailed profiles of your ideal customers based on real behavioral data.
Trend Forecasting: Identifying upcoming industry shifts so you can position your brand ahead of the curve.
Pricing Sensitivity: Determining the exact price points that maximize both volume and profit margins.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Actionable Data: We don't just give you raw numbers; we give you strategic next steps based on the data.
Global Reach: Capacity to conduct quantitative and qualitative research across 50+ countries.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Brand Strategy
- Category: Consulting
- Description: Define who you are, your voice, and why you matter in the crowded marketplace to build lasting loyalty and premium positioning.
- Key Offerings: Brand Positioning, Voice & Tone Guidelines
- Detailed Features:
Core Identity Mapping: Defining your mission, vision, values, and the unique emotional hook of your brand.
Visual Direction: Establishing the foundational aesthetic that will guide all your design efforts.
Messaging Architecture: Creating clear, compelling taglines and elevator pitches that resonate instantly.
Market Positioning: Finding the specific "whitespace" in your industry where you can dominate.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Award-Winning Strategists: Our team has shaped the narratives of some of the world's most beloved modern brands.
Psychology-Driven: Rooting your brand strategy in deep consumer psychology and behavioral science.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: CMS Development
- Category: Development
- Description: Flexible content management systems tailored to your specific workflow requirements, empowering your marketing team to move fast.
- Key Offerings: Custom WordPress Themes, Plugin Development
- Detailed Features:
Headless CMS Architecture: Decoupling the frontend from the backend for lightning-fast speeds and omnichannel delivery.
Bespoke Theme Creation: Pixel-perfect, custom-coded themes that align exactly with your brand identity.
Advanced User Roles: Setting up complex permission structures for editorial teams and contributors.
Content Migration: Safely moving thousands of articles and assets from your old platform to the new CMS.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Scalable Architecture: Systems built to handle millions of monthly visitors without crashing or slowing down.
Editor-Friendly: Intuitive backend interfaces that require zero technical knowledge for your team to use.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: API Integration
- Category: Development
- Description: Seamlessly connect third-party services to your applications for unified operations and automated data flow across your business.
- Key Offerings: REST API Development, GraphQL Implementation
- Detailed Features:
Custom API Gateways: Building secure, centralized hubs to manage traffic between your internal microservices.
Third-Party Syncing: Connecting your app with Stripe, Twilio, Salesforce, and hundreds of other SaaS platforms.
Legacy System Bridging: Creating modern API wrappers around old databases so they can talk to new web apps.
Real-time WebSockets: Implementing live data feeds for dashboards, chat apps, and financial tickers.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Bank-Grade Security: Implementing OAuth2, JWT, and strict rate-limiting to keep your data pipelines secure.
High Availability: Architecting fault-tolerant integrations that handle downtime of third-party services gracefully.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: WhatsApp Automation
- Category: Automation & AI
- Description: Automate customer interactions and sales directly through WhatsApp. Engage your audience where they already spend their time.
- Key Offerings: WhatsApp API setup, WhatsApp Chatbot
- Detailed Features:
Official API Integration: Setup and verification of the official WhatsApp Business API for your brand.
Custom Chatbots: Intelligent routing and automated responses to handle 80% of customer queries instantly.
Broadcast Campaigns: Send targeted promotional messages to opted-in customers with 98% open rates.
CRM Sync: Automatically log conversations and update lead statuses in your existing CRM.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Meta Business Partners: Direct access to the latest WhatsApp features and priority support.
Compliance Guaranteed: Strict adherence to WhatsApp messaging policies to protect your number.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Email Automation
- Category: Automation & AI
- Description: Nurture leads and increase conversions with intelligent email flows that send exactly the right message at the right time.
- Key Offerings: Drip campaign setup, Lead nurturing
- Detailed Features:
Welcome Sequences: Onboarding new subscribers and converting them into first-time buyers automatically.
Cart Abandonment: Recovering lost revenue with highly personalized reminder emails and dynamic discounts.
Behavioral Triggers: Sending emails based on what users click, pages they visit, or actions they take in your app.
A/B Testing Automations: Continuously optimizing subject lines and send times to maximize open and click rates.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Deliverability Experts: Ensuring your automated emails land in the primary inbox, not the spam or promotions folder.
Platform Agnostic: We can build these flows in Klaviyo, Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, or Hubspot.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: AI Voice Agent
- Category: Automation & AI
- Description: Next-gen AI agents for 24/7 support, sales, and booking. Deploy conversational AI that sounds completely human over the phone.
- Key Offerings: Website Voice Assistant, AI Sales Agent
- Detailed Features:
Inbound Call Handling: AI agents that answer FAQs, route calls, and schedule appointments instantly.
Outbound Lead Qualification: Automated dialing and conversational qualification of thousands of leads per day.
Emotional Intelligence: Voice models that detect customer frustration and adapt their tone or escalate to a human.
System Integration: Agents that can directly update your calendar, CRM, or ticketing system during a call.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Ultra-Low Latency: Sub-500ms response times so conversations feel completely natural and unscripted.
Custom Voice Cloning: Train the AI to sound exactly like your best sales rep or a specific brand persona.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Automation & CRM
- Category: Automation & AI
- Description: Streamline your operations with powerful integrations and workflows, eliminating manual data entry and human error.
- Key Offerings: Zapier, Make.com automations, Lead routing systems
- Detailed Features:
Complex Workflow Design: Connecting 5+ different apps to trigger cascading actions from a single event.
CRM Architecture: Setting up Salesforce or HubSpot with custom objects and automated pipelines.
Automated Invoicing: Triggering contract creation, signature requests, and invoice generation automatically upon closing a deal.
Data Cleansing Bots: Scripts that constantly scan your database to merge duplicates and enrich missing info.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Certified Experts: Our team holds advanced certifications in Zapier, Make, HubSpot, and Salesforce.
Bulletproof Logic: Extensive error handling so your automations don't break when an edge case occurs.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Custom Chatbot Dev
- Category: Automation & AI
- Description: Intelligent conversational agents to automate support and sales on your website, trained on your company's specific data.
- Key Offerings: NLP Integration, Multi-platform Support
- Detailed Features:
RAG Architecture: Retrieval-Augmented Generation bots that read your PDFs and websites to give 100% accurate answers.
E-commerce Concierge: Bots that recommend products, check inventory, and handle returns right in the chat window.
Omnichannel Deployment: Deploying the same bot brain across your Website, Telegram, Slack, and Discord.
Human Handoff: Seamlessly transferring complex issues to human agents with full conversation context.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Zero Hallucinations: Strict prompt engineering and guardrails to ensure the bot never invents false information.
Deep Analytics: Dashboards showing exactly what users are asking and where the bot needs improvement.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Data Analytics & AI
- Category: Automation & AI
- Description: Transform raw data into actionable business intelligence using advanced AI analytics, machine learning, and visual dashboards.
- Key Offerings: Predictive Analytics, Data Visualization Dashboards
- Detailed Features:
Custom Dashboards: Real-time BI dashboards built in Tableau, PowerBI, or custom React interfaces.
Churn Prediction Models: AI algorithms that flag which customers are likely to leave before they actually cancel.
Demand Forecasting: Machine learning models predicting future sales volume to optimize inventory and staffing.
Sentiment Analysis: Scraping and analyzing thousands of reviews and tweets to measure brand health instantly.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
PhD-Level Data Scientists: Algorithms built by experts who understand the underlying math, not just off-the-shelf tools.
Data Privacy First: Strict compliance with GDPR and HIPAA when handling and anonymizing sensitive datasets.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Business Consulting
- Category: Consulting
- Description: Strategic guidance to help you scale your operations, optimize revenue streams, and build a sustainable long-term business model.
- Key Offerings: Digital Transformation, Growth Strategy
- Detailed Features:
Revenue Operations (RevOps): Aligning your sales, marketing, and customer success teams to maximize revenue generation.
M&A Advisory: Technical and operational due diligence for companies looking to acquire or be acquired.
Organizational Restructuring: Redesigning team structures and reporting lines for maximum agility and accountability.
Market Expansion: Strategic playbooks for entering new geographic regions or launching entirely new product lines.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
C-Suite Experience: Consultants who have served as CEOs, COOs, and CROs at major corporations.
Results-Tied Compensation: We are confident enough in our advice to tie a portion of our fees to your business outcomes.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: SEO Optimization
- Category: Marketing
- Description: Drive organic traffic and rank higher on search engines with proven strategies. Build long-term visibility for your brand.
- Key Offerings: On-Page SEO, Off-Page SEO
- Detailed Features:
Technical SEO Audit: Deep analysis of your website infrastructure to resolve crawling and indexing issues.
Keyword Strategy: Identifying high-intent search terms to target users ready to convert.
Content Optimization: Structuring and writing content that satisfies both search engines and human readers.
Authority Building: Acquiring high-quality backlinks from relevant, authoritative domains.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
White-Hat Techniques: Sustainable strategies that survive algorithm updates.
Transparent Reporting: Live dashboards showing exactly how your rankings and organic traffic are growing.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Branding & Design
- Category: Marketing
- Description: Create a lasting impact with world-class design and creative assets that communicate your value proposition instantly.
- Key Offerings: Logo Design, Brand Identity Design
- Detailed Features:
Logo & Iconography: Timeless, scalable logo design and custom icon sets that represent your core identity.
Brand Guidelines: Comprehensive rulebooks for typography, color palettes, and imagery usage.
Marketing Collateral: Beautifully designed pitch decks, whitepapers, business cards, and social media templates.
Packaging Design: Premium physical packaging that creates an unforgettable unboxing experience.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Award-Winning Studio: Designs recognized by Awwwards, Behance, and international design councils.
Strategic Aesthetics: Design choices driven by market research and target audience psychology, not just trends.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Content Marketing
- Category: Marketing
- Description: Strategic content creation that drives traffic, engagement, and conversions. Establish your brand as an industry thought leader.
- Key Offerings: Blog Writing & Strategy, Video Scriptwriting
- Detailed Features:
Long-Form Articles: In-depth, SEO-optimized blog posts that rank high and provide massive value to readers.
Video Production: Scripting, shooting, and editing high-retention videos for YouTube, TikTok, and Reels.
Lead Magnets: Designing irresistible ebooks, templates, and webinars that capture email addresses.
Content Repurposing: Turning one podcast episode into 10 tweets, 3 LinkedIn posts, and a blog article.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Industry-Specific Writers: Content written by subject matter experts, not generalist copywriters.
Conversion Focused: Every piece of content is engineered with a specific business goal and CTA in mind.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Social Media Management
- Category: Marketing
- Description: Build a loyal community and increase brand awareness on all major platforms through consistent, engaging, and native content.
- Key Offerings: Content Calendar Planning, Community Management
- Detailed Features:
Multi-Platform Strategy: Tailored content for LinkedIn (B2B), Instagram (Visual), and X (Real-time).
Community Engagement: Active daily interaction with your followers, responding to comments and DMs to build loyalty.
Influencer Partnerships: Identifying, negotiating, and managing campaigns with micro and macro influencers.
Viral Trend Jacking: Agile content creation to capitalize on trending audio and memes while staying on-brand.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Always-On Approach: We monitor your social channels 7 days a week to protect brand reputation.
Data-Backed Posting: Algorithms determine exactly what time and day yields the highest engagement for your audience.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: PPC Advertising
- Category: Marketing
- Description: Maximize your ROI with targeted Pay-Per-Click campaigns across search and display networks, driving instant qualified traffic.
- Key Offerings: Google Search Ads, Display Advertising
- Detailed Features:
Search Intent Campaigns: Bidding on bottom-of-funnel keywords to capture users who are ready to buy immediately.
Programmatic Display: Placing highly visual banner ads on premium websites where your audience hangs out.
Shopping Ads Optimization: Managing Google Merchant Center feeds to dominate product search results.
Landing Page Optimization: A/B testing the destination pages to ensure the paid traffic actually converts into sales.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Google Premier Partners: Top 3% of agencies globally, giving us beta access to new ad features.
Zero Wasted Spend: Aggressive negative keyword management and placement exclusions to protect your budget.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: Website Development
- Category: Development
- Description: Custom, high-performance websites tailored to your specific business needs. We build blazing-fast, scalable web applications.
- Key Offerings: Business Websites, E-commerce Stores
- Detailed Features:
Custom Web Apps: Full-stack web applications built with modern frameworks like React and Next.js.
E-commerce Solutions: High-converting online stores built on Shopify or custom headless commerce platforms.
Responsive Design: Flawless experiences across all devices, from ultra-wide monitors to mobile phones.
Performance Optimization: Sub-second load times and perfect Core Web Vitals scores for maximum SEO benefit.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Modern Tech Stack: We use the latest technologies to ensure your website is future-proof and scalable.
Security First: Enterprise-grade security practices to protect your data and your users.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: App Development
- Category: Development
- Description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android. Build engaging mobile experiences that users love.
- Key Offerings: iOS App Development, Android App Development
- Detailed Features:
Cross-Platform Apps: Efficient development using React Native to deploy on both iOS and Android from a single codebase.
Native iOS/Android: High-performance native applications in Swift and Kotlin for demanding use cases.
UI/UX Design: Intuitive and beautiful mobile interfaces designed specifically for touch interactions.
App Store Optimization: Strategic publishing to maximize visibility and downloads in Apple and Google stores.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Top Rated Agency: Our apps have achieved millions of downloads and 4.9+ star ratings.
End-to-End Delivery: From concept and design to development, testing, and App Store launch.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: E-commerce Solutions
- Category: Development
- Description: Scalable online stores built on Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom stacks to maximize sales and streamline inventory management.
- Key Offerings: Shopify & WooCommerce, Custom Cart Development
- Detailed Features:
Headless Commerce: Separating the frontend shopping experience from the backend inventory for ultra-fast load speeds.
Custom Checkout Flows: Reducing cart abandonment by removing friction and adding one-click upsell capabilities.
ERP/Inventory Sync: Connecting your storefront directly to SAP, NetSuite, or warehouse management systems.
Subscription Models: Building complex recurring billing systems for subscription box and SaaS companies.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
High-Volume Specialists: We build stores capable of handling massive traffic spikes during Black Friday and product drops.
Conversion Rate Optimized: Every pixel of the store is designed based on proven e-commerce conversion principles.

Vector.Ai Service details:
- Title: UI/UX Design
- Category: Development
- Description: User-centric designs that ensure intuitive navigation, reduce friction, and deliver exceptional digital experiences across all touchpoints.
- Key Offerings: Wireframing, Interactive Prototyping
- Detailed Features:
User Journey Mapping: Plotting every interaction a user has with your product to eliminate confusing dead-ends.
High-Fidelity Prototyping: Clickable Figma prototypes that look and feel exactly like the final coded product.
Usability Testing: Putting designs in front of real users and recording their sessions to find points of friction.
Design Systems: Creating comprehensive component libraries so your future development scales consistently.
- Why Trust Us for this Service:
Data-Driven Design: We don't rely on gut feelings; our design decisions are backed by heatmaps and analytics.
Accessibility Compliant: Ensuring your digital products meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards for users with disabilities.
